implementation_summary.summary: CP00-850 extends the descriptor-only RP28 Marketplace bridge through the secondary workflow test tail, permission/audit binding rows, and synthetic fixture-set head without executing runtime submission, permission, audit, install, receipt, fixture, rollback, retry, or smoke-test behavior.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-850 RP28.P02.M04.S19-RP28.P02.M06.S14 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

review_adjudication.p3_disposition: CP850-P3-01 is closed by running the full validation suite after queue regeneration and before commit; command-evidence records the suite at exit 0.
